children.aria-label:
JVM Arguments - JVM arguments to pass to the execution runtime. The arguments must be separated by whitespace. For example:

-Dexample.name=value -Xmx1024m}
children.label: JVM Arguments

children.aria-label:
Program Arguments - Program arguments to pass to the execution runtime. The arguments must be separated by whitespace. For example:

-exampleName exampleValue
-exampleOption
children.label: Program Arguments

children.aria-label:
Environment Variables - Environment variables to set in the execution runtime. The variables must be in the format name=value and be separated by whitespace. For example:

EXAMPLE=Value
QUOTE_EXAMPLE="A value with spaces"
children.label: Environment Variables
